name: lightTravelTime
_note: astronomy.lightTravelTime is a pure-compute LENS_ACTIONS handler. It converts a distance (light-years / parsecs / AU) into a lookback time. Fail-CLOSED: a non-finite or overflow-magnitude distance is REJECTED via finiteOr() so the multiplication distance × 9.461e12 km/ly can never produce an Infinity km string. A cosmologically-large-but-finite distance (e.g. 1.38e10 ly) is preserved. An empty input returns a guidance message, not a crash. LENS_ACTIONS-only registration; the lens reaches it via /api/lens/run.
